case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF VS MONT DINA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $300.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE AS TO DEFENDANT MONT DINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-21-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MONT DINA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MONT DINA $300.00 PRINCIPAL, $25.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $325.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MONT DINA
